rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core contribution is a structural demand/supply model used for policy counterfactual simulation, and the cited paper is a conceptual piece explicitly about “Structural Modeling and Policy Simulation” and policy-invariant structural primitives. This makes the cited work a plausible foundational/theory source for the citing paper’s methodology rather than an incidental mention. The pair also has a direct DOI match in the reference metadata.
